user.title: Add React Dashboard
user.description: Register a new React dashboard panel from an installed template.

data.title: Sidebar title
data.slug: URL slug (used in panel URL and /custom-dashboard/SLUG)
data.public: Public standalone URL (no Home Assistant login required)

error.invalid_slug: Slug must be 2–31 chars, lowercase letters, digits, hyphens or underscores, starting with a letter or digit.

abort.already_configured: A dashboard with this slug already exists.
abort.no_templates: No templates installed. Install one via the glasshopper.install_template service or drop a folder in [config]/glasshopper_templates/ and call glasshopper.reload_templates.

install_template.name: Install template from URL
install_template.description: Download and install a React dashboard template zip from a URL.

template_id.name: Template ID
template_id.description: Optional override for the folder name.
